commands.repair_reason: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can address the requiredScopes iterator bug, but maintainer review is still needed afterward for the broad fail-closed compatibility policy.; Needs attention: The diff touches security-sensitive Gateway authorization surfaces, and the remaining requiredScopes iterator bug can still turn malformed plugin metadata into an availability failure instead of a contr...; Review finding: [P2]... (sha=c6964ac4a08df694550ba3e6749bdf5fad21de5e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens many plugin-owned schema, metadata, provider, Codex, agent, and Gateway boundaries against unreadable or malformed values, with targeted fuzz regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection plus a Node probe show that `for...of` over a plugin-owned array still throws when the iterator is unreadable. I did not run the full OpenClaw test suite in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can address the `requiredScopes` iterator bug, but maintainer review is still needed afterward for the broad fail-closed compatibility policy.
